title: Wentworth 4 Seater Imperial Dining Set
description:
Wentworth 4 Seater Imperial Dining Set
Elevate your outdoor dining experience with the Wentworth Imperial Dining Set, a stunning blend of timeless design and modern comfort. Crafted with a rust-proof aluminium frame and hand-woven synthetic half-round rattan weave, this set offers both style and durability, ensuring it withstands the test of time.

The set features a round tempered glass top table, complete with a parasol hole for added convenience on sunny days. Each of the six stylish Imperial chairs is designed for comfort, featuring weather shield seat and back cushions that are both shower and stain resistant, making them perfect for outdoor use.

Whether you‚'re hosting a casual lunch or a formal dinner, the Wentworth 4 Seater Imperial Dining Set provides a relaxing and comfortable setting for all your outdoor gatherings. Enjoy al fresco dining in style and comfort with this elegant addition to your patio or garden!

Outdoor Dining Sets
Having a garden, or any kind of outdoor space, is a real privilege ‚ and one which should be maximised to ensure it is not taken for granted. If you are lucky enough to have a bit more space to play with, like a generous patio, creating different zones can help you make the most of it. Of course, lots of variations to choose from but, ultimately, having an area for alfresco dining will suit most needs.

Setting up an outdoor dining room is garden goals. This will provide a delightful place to host lunches and dinners, and its sheer heaven to eat breakfast outside on a spring and summer day. Whether you opt for an outdoor dining garden furniture set which boasts a dining table and armchairs for a smart, cohesive look or a table set with foldable, stackable or reclining seats for practicality and space saving. We have many dining garden furniture sets available from a range of materials such as rattan, rope effect, aluminium, responsibly sourced wood and 100% recyclable plastic.

The Wentworth Range
The Wentworth range is one of our most popular rattan garden furniture ranges. The range features neutral coloured synthetic rattan which makes this range timeless and suitable for any type of garden. With plenty of lounging and dining options, you will not be disappointed in the Wentworth rattan range to style your outdoor living space.

Features:

Product Material: Synthetic Rattan

Main Colour: Beige

Cushion colour: Grey

Rust Proof Aluminium Frame

Tempered glass table with parasol hole

Shower and stain resistant cushions included

Practical and space saving design

Compliments any outdoor living space

4 x Imperial Chairs

8 x Weather shield cushions

Bold lines, modern statement. The LUCCA collection in black brings a striking, architectural edge to outdoor living. Its sculptural open-frame design is paired with deep cushions and a sleek powder-coated finish, creating a set that feels both contemporary and timeless. Perfect for making a statement on the patio or terrace, LUCCA Black is modern outdoor lounging at its best.

The frame is crafted from high-performance aluminium with a fade-resistant, powder-coated finish in matte black. UKFR-compliant cushions, 15 cm thick, deliver everyday comfort with safety assurance, upholstered in durable polyester fabric. A matching coffee table completes the set, designed with a 20 mm GRC top for a strong, minimalist finish.

 

Features

Durable aluminium frame with a fade-resistant black powder-coated finish

Striking open-frame design for a bold, architectural look

UKFR-compliant cushions with deep seat pads for comfort and safety

Hard-wearing polyester fabric designed for reliable outdoor use

Sleek coffee table with a strong glassfibre reinforced concrete (GRC) top

Guarantee - All Royalcraft furniture comes with a 2-year guarantee T&C's apply

title: Wentworth 4 Seater Carver Dining Set
description:
The Wentworth 4 Seater Carver Dining Set is the perfect choice for elevating your al-fresco dining experience with its timeless design. Featuring a classic aesthetic, this set is constructed with a sturdy aluminium framework and hand-woven synthetic half-round rattan, ensuring a blend of style, comfort, strength, and durability.
The set includes a spacious tempered glass top table, paired with four elegantly designed carver chairs, each equipped with Weather Shield seat cushions for enhanced comfort and protection against the elements.
Ideal for gatherings with family and friends, the Wentworth 4 Seater Carver Dining Set combines functionality with elegance, making it a wonderful addition to any outdoor space. Enjoy memorable meals and relaxed moments in style with this beautifully crafted dining set.

Outdoor Dining Sets
Having a garden, or any kind of outdoor space, is a real privilege ‚Äö and one which should be maximised to ensure it is not taken for granted. If you are lucky enough to have a bit more space to play with, like a generous patio, creating different zones can help you make the most of it. Of course, lots of variations to choose from but, ultimately, having an area for alfresco dining will suit most needs.

Setting up an outdoor dining room is garden goals. This will provide a delightful place to host lunches and dinners, and its sheer heaven to eat breakfast outside on a spring and summer day. Whether you opt for an outdoor dining garden furniture set which boasts a dining table and armchairs for a smart, cohesive look or a table set with foldable, stackable or reclining seats for practicality and space saving. We have many dining garden furniture sets available from a range of materials such as rattan, rope effect, aluminium, responsibly sourced wood and 100% recyclable plastic.

The Wentworth Range
The Wentworth range is one of our most popular rattan garden furniture ranges. The range features neutral coloured synthetic rattan which makes this range timeless and suitable for any type of garden. With plenty of lounging and dining options, you will not be disappointed in the Wentworth rattan range to style your outdoor living space.

title: OURA Natural Oak Rattan Sideboard
description:
The OURA Sideboard blends natural texture with clean, functional design. Handwoven rattan-effect panels across the sliding doors add depth and visual interest, softly concealing contents while bringing a relaxed, design-led feel to your space. The smooth-glide sliding door design makes it ideal for compact areas, offering practicality without compromising on style. Raised on angled, mid-century inspired legs, OURA feels light and elevated, while the generous 180cm surface provides ample room for styling lamps, artwork or statement accessories. Finished in a neutral light oak tone, the OURA Sideboard complements interiors from modern Scandinavian to relaxed contemporary.

title: ORYN 5-Seater Lounging Set with Coffee & Side Table
description:
ORYN 5-Seater Lounging Set with Coffee & Side Table

Designed for those who appreciate modern minimalism with a hint of indulgence, ORYN brings an architectural elegance to outdoor living. Its distinctive oval aluminium frame, finished in a chocolate brown coat, contrasts beautifully with the soft, natural linen upholstery, creating a warm, tonal palette that feels effortlessly sophisticated.

Wrapped in premium leather detailing, the frame introduces texture and tactility, adding an elevated, interior-inspired edge that seamlessly blurs the line between indoors and out. The clean linear profile and structured form give ORYN a strong, contemporary identity, yet its generous proportions and deep cushions invite pure relaxation.

Each seat cushion is upholstered in 100% Olefin Axroma fabric, chosen for its luxurious hand-feel and exceptional performance outdoors. Filled with over 500g of high-density sponge, the comfort rivals that of indoor furniture.

A nesting, versatile dual-level sintered stone coffee table design that can be arranged to suit your space. Balancing practicality with sculptural design. Together, they anchor the set as a true statement of style, perfect for poolside lounging or refined alfresco entertaining.

Features

Architectural oval aluminium frame with a rich chocolate brown coated finish

Leather-wrapped detailing adds contrast and texture

Natural Linen Olefin fabric – durable, fade-resistant, and luxuriously smooth

High-density 500g sponge cushions for indulgent comfort

Dual-level sintered stone coffee table design for adaptable entertaining

Sintered stone side table with a sleek, contemporary finish

UKFR compliant and built for year-round durability

title: Standard 3M Grey Cantilever Parasol
description:
Standard Cantilever Parasol

The 3m Cantilever Garden Parasol is designed to create a generous area of cooling shade, perfect for your corner lounging sets or dining table. Here are the key features:

Free-Standing Design: Eliminates the need for a central pole, providing versatile placement options.

Crank and Tilt System: Easily adjust the canopy position for optimal shade throughout the day.

Weather-Proof Fabric: Made from durable polyester with a weather-proof coating and UPF 50 sun protection.

Recommended Usage: Keep the parasol closed when not in use and in windy conditions for safety.

Elegant Aesthetic: Adds a classic modern touch to your outdoor space, perfect for enhancing your dining experience outdoors.

Easy to Store: Hinged ribs allow for simple opening and closing, making it easy to store when not in use.

Sturdy Construction: Features a powder-coated aluminium frame with steel base support for stability.

This parasol not only offers practical shade but also serves as an attractive addition to your garden, making outdoor dining and relaxation enjoyable year-round!

Material: Polyester Fabric, Weather-Proof Coating & UPF Sun Protection Level 50

Colour: Grey

title: Luxe 4x3m Pergola with Solar Lighting System and Voice Control - No screens
description:
Good design doesn't shout, it speaks softly through detail, precision, and innovation. The Royalcraft Luxe 4x3m Pergola is crafted for those who appreciate modern design, functionality, and comfort in perfect balance.
Constructed from industrial-grade aluminium with a powder-coated finish, the Luxe Pergola brings a sculptural, architectural presence to your outdoor space. Its double-layer louvred roof allows you to control sunlight and shade effortlessly with a smooth manual handle, offering full flexibility through every season.
As day turns to night, the integrated solar lighting system creates an ambient glow, powered sustainably through a discreet solar panel and rechargeable battery. With voice-activated LED control, you can switch from day mode to evening relaxation with ease.
The result: intelligent design that transforms your garden into a year-round retreat, elegant, functional, and distinctly Royalcraft.

Key Features

Premium powder-coated aluminium construction in a modern matte finish

Double-layer louvred roof for superior strength and shade control

Integrated solar lighting system with rechargeable battery

Voice control for LED lighting 

Manual handle operation for easy adjustment

Heavy-duty 100 x 100mm standing posts for exceptional stability

Low-maintenance, rust-resistant, and built for all-season use

Dimensions: 4m x 3 m

5 year structural warranty

Are Pergolas Waterproof?
Our Royalcraft Luxe Pergolas are rain-resistant rather than fully waterproof.
Each pergola features a double-layer aluminium louvred roof that can be tilted or fully closed to provide protection from light to moderate rain. When the louvres are shut, rainwater is cleverly channelled through an integrated drainage system built into the frame, allowing it to flow down through the legs and away from your seating area.

During heavier or prolonged rainfall, a small amount of water may enter through the joins ‚Äî this is normal for louvred roof systems, which are designed for ventilation and year-round durability, not complete watertightness.

Privacy screens not included

When the louvres are shut, rainwater is cleverly channelled through an integrated drainage system built into the frame, allowing it to flow down through the legs and away from your seating area.

During heavier or prolonged rainfall, a small amount of water may enter through the joins ‚Äî this is normal for louvred roof systems, which are designed for ventilation and year-round durability, not complete watertightness.

Privacy screens not included

title: London 4 Seater Square Folding Set with London Rope Folding Armchairs
description:
Create a welcoming outdoor dining space with the Royalcraft London Four Seater Folding Dining Set. Crafted from FSC 100% certified Acacia hardwood and finished with a natural oil treatment, this set highlights the character and durability of sustainably sourced timber. The London collection blends traditional craftsmanship with contemporary touches, making it an excellent choice for gardens, patios, and decking areas.

The 90cm square folding table provides ample space for relaxed dining while remaining practical and easy to handle. Designed with a central parasol hole and cap, it allows you to add shade on brighter days without compromising on style. Four matching rope folding armchairs complete the set, combining the warmth of natural wood with the modern texture of woven rope for a versatile and comfortable seating solution.

Designed for FlexibilityWith folding mechanisms across both the table and chairs, this set offers convenient storage and portability. The chairs fold flat for easy stacking when not in use, making them especially suitable for smaller spaces or for those who like to rearrange their garden layout throughout the year. Durable hardwood construction and sturdy rope detailing ensure that comfort and practicality are always at the forefront.

What's Included

90cm square London folding table with parasol hole and cap

Four London rope folding armchairs

Key Features

FSC 100% certified Acacia hardwood with natural oil finish

Folding design for easy storage and space saving convenience

90cm square table ideal for four diners

Rope weave detailing adds a contemporary touch

Parasol hole and cap included for shade options

Perfect for patios, decking, and garden dining areas

Enjoy Outdoor Living in StyleFrom family breakfasts in the sunshine to evening meals outdoors, the London Four Seater Folding Dining Set creates the perfect backdrop for everyday dining. Combining natural materials with a thoughtful folding design, it is a stylish and sustainable addition to any outdoor setting.

title: London 2 Seater Square Folding Bistro Set with London Rope Folding Armchairs
description:
Bring timeless charm and practical design to your outdoor space with the Royalcraft London Folding Bistro Set. Crafted from FSC 100% certified Acacia hardwood and finished with a natural oil treatment, this set showcases the beauty of sustainably sourced timber while providing long lasting durability. The London collection is designed for both function and style, making it an ideal choice for patios, decking, and smaller garden spaces where versatility is key.

The 70cm square folding table includes a parasol hole and cap, giving you the option to add shade on sunny days while maintaining a neat and polished look when the parasol is not in use. The two accompanying rope folding armchairs combine the warmth of natural wood with the contemporary appeal of hand woven rope, creating a set that feels both modern and classic.

Designed for Everyday LivingWith folding mechanisms on both the table and chairs, this bistro set offers convenience as well as elegance. When not in use, the chairs fold flat for easy storage, making them perfect for compact spaces or seasonal use. The sturdy Acacia hardwood construction, paired with the tactile rope detail, ensures comfort and reliability while adding texture and style to your outdoor area.

What's Included

70cm square London folding table with parasol hole and cap

Two London rope folding armchairs

Key Features

FSC 100% certified Acacia hardwood with natural oil finish

Folding design for easy storage and space saving convenience

Parasol hole and cap for shade flexibility

Rope detailing for a contemporary touch

Ideal for patios, balconies, and decking areas

Create a Relaxed Outdoor SettingWhether enjoying a morning coffee, sharing lunch with a friend, or unwinding with an evening drink, the London Folding Bistro Set is designed to elevate everyday moments outdoors. With its blend of sustainable materials, classic craftsmanship, and practical function, it offers a stylish and lasting addition to any outdoor retreat.

title: Sol 5 Seater Corner Lounge Set with Square Coffee Table
description:
Transform your outdoor living with the Royalcraft Sol Corner Lounge Set, a contemporary collection that blends sustainability, comfort, and timeless design.

 Crafted with FSC 100% certified Acacia wood and finished with a light teak PU coating, this set highlights the natural beauty of responsibly sourced timber while offering lasting durability. The eco chic rattan weave seating and soft spun polyester cushions bring both style and relaxation, making it the perfect choice for modern outdoor living.

Whether you are enjoying long summer afternoons with family, hosting friends on a warm evening, or simply unwinding in your own quiet retreat, the Sol Corner Set offers versatile comfort that adapts to every occasion. Its modular design maximises space, while the low profile silhouette and natural tones give your garden or patio a considered, inviting feel.

Built to Last, Designed to ImpressThe combination of Acacia wood and synthetic half round rattan ensures strength, weather resistance, and easy maintenance. Galvanised fittings provide added protection against rust, while UKFR standard cushions keep safety and comfort front of mind. This is furniture made not only to be enjoyed today but also to be relied on for years to come.

What's Included

90cm square Sol coffee table

Left hand sofa section

Right hand sofa section

Corner seat unit

3 seat cushions and 6 back cushions made with spun polyester fabric

Key Features

FSC 100% certified Acacia wood with PU light teak finish

8mm half round synthetic rattan weave for a contemporary look

Galvanised fittings for rust protection

Durable UKFR cushions for peace of mind

Contemporary styling that complements any outdoor setting

title: Standard 3M Ivory Cantilever Parasol
description:
Cantilever Parasol

The 3m Cantilever Garden Parasol is designed to create a generous area of cooling shade, perfect for your corner lounging sets or dining table. Here are the key features:

Free-Standing Design: Eliminates the need for a central pole, providing versatile placement options.

Crank and Tilt System: Easily adjust the canopy position for optimal shade throughout the day.

Weather-Proof Fabric: Made from durable polyester with a weather-proof coating and UPF 50 sun protection.

Recommended Usage: Keep the parasol closed when not in use and in windy conditions for safety.

Elegant Aesthetic: Adds a classic modern touch to your outdoor space, perfect for enhancing your dining experience outdoors.

Easy to Store: Hinged ribs allow for simple opening and closing, making it easy to store when not in use.

Sturdy Construction: Features a powder-coated aluminium frame with steel base support for stability.

This parasol not only offers practical shade but also serves as an attractive addition to your garden, making outdoor dining and relaxation enjoyable year-round!

Features

Material: Polyester Fabric, Weather-Proof Coating & UPF Sun Protection Level 50

Colour: Ivory

Round Parasol with Cross Stand

Tilt feature to adjust canopy position when required

Shower Proof and Sun protection level 50

Powder Coated Aluminium Frame with Steel Base Support

Stylish and Modern Design

The base shown in the images is for illustration purposes only and is not included with the parasol

Parasol & Bases Ranges
The range of Royalcraft overhanging cantilever parasols is perfect for use with relaxers, bistros, corner dining and lounging sets where a freestanding parasol is required.

The Royalcraft standard range of parasols are ideal for use with our furniture sets and bases, with crank mechanisms and tilt feature, 38mm and 48mm aluminium poles and 6-8 rib options.

title: 14kg Poly Resin Parasol Base
description:
This 14kg round poly resin parasol base is the perfect way to secure a parasol under your garden table. Made from Poly Resin it is suitable for parasols with a pole diameter between 35 -48mm.

Parasol bases are weighted stands that keep your umbrella straight, sturdy, and in place. All you have to do is insert your umbrella into the hole in the base and tighten the base until it fits snugly.

Fillable bases should be filled with water or sand. Fill with water when planning to relocate its position.

Parasols provide shade, shelter from rain and a place to rest, while acting as an ornamental feature. A perfect way to add a classic modern style to bring your indoor fine dining outside while still having protection from the elements. The modern umbrella consists of a circular fabric or plastic screen stretched over hinged ribs that radiate from a central pole. Its hinged ribs permit the screen to be opened and closed so that the umbrella can be carried with ease when not in use.

Suitable for 35-48mm pole diameters

title: Paris 2 Seater Imperial Companion Set
description:
The Paris 2 Seater Imperial Companion Set is an ideal choice for enjoying serene moments in a variety of outdoor spaces. With its timeless design, this set beautifully combines style, comfort, and practicality.

Classic Construction: Crafted with a robust aluminium framework and hand-woven synthetic double half-round rattan weave, ensuring strength and durability against the elements.

Versatile Use: Ideal for patios, gardens, or balconies, this set creates a cozy atmosphere for everything from morning coffee to evening conversations.

With its elegant aesthetic and durable materials, the Paris 2 Seater Imperial Companion Set promises years of enjoyment, making it a charming addition to any outdoor setting.

Companion Sets
The gardens of our homes can be a haven for peaceful sitting, social events and enjoying the nature of British spring and summer. Where we like to enjoy a moment of self-care and relaxation, garden companion seats can become a perfect place to sit back and chill out. Traditionally made out of rattan, metal or wood, companion seats generally come fully attached as two-person chairs with a table in the middle making them very a much sought-after garden furniture item.

Nowadays, you can find companion seats in all sorts of modern and contemporary designs‚ including the infamous egg chairs. Much like the bistro sets, this piece of garden furniture is a perfect accessory to any size garden patio or balcony. It is ideal for those who enjoy a cup of tea or glass of wine outdoors. It too provides an intimate and romantic setting outdoors.

Companion seats are generally made to sit two people (hence the name), so you'll want to make sure you have enough space to fit this in a place in your garden. Where you may already have a social seating area, companion seats are a great option for more mellow, solitary spaces that allow you to have some peace.

The Paris Collection
The Paris Collection is made using a slate grey double half round synthetic rattan, which makes this one of our premium collections. title: Algarve Awning Gazebo
description:
The Algarve Awning Gazebo is a stunning addition to any garden, providing ample shade and shelter for garden parties or barbecues. With its sleek grey steel framework, it exudes classic style and elegance, enhancing your outdoor space.
The gazebo features a 180g/m 300D grey polyester PU-coated canopy that is showerproof, complete with a raised air vent and a foldable awning. Designed with drainage holes, the awning ensures that excess rainwater does not accumulate, keeping your gatherings comfortable and dry. Make a bold statement in your garden with the Algarve Awning Gazebo!

Gazebos are a freestanding roofed structure and open on all sides. They provide shade, shelter from rain and a place to rest, while acting as an ornamental feature. To add a sense of enclosure and privacy some of our gazebos include curtains. This is a perfect way to add a classic modern style to bring your indoor fine dining outside while still having protection from the elements. Why not add garden furniture underneath your gazebo or even a hot tub to bring the luxurious socializing experience throughout the year.

3.3x3.3m + 2.1m Awning Gazebo in Grey

Grey Smooth Finish Steel Posts

Powder coated Steel Frame

Awning can be folded down and secured to posts when not in use
